goal: p * count_prime_factor(p, binom(a + b)(a)) + digit_sum(p, a + b) = count_prime_factor(p, binom(a + b)(a)) + digit_sum(p, a) + digit_sum(p, b)
is_addition_carry_count(p, a, b, count_prime_factor(p, binom(a + b)(a)))
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { x0 * x1 + digit_sum(x0, x2 + x3) = x1 + digit_sum(x0, x2) + digit_sum(x0, x3) = is_addition_carry_count(x0, x2, x3, x1) }(p, count_prime_factor(p, binom(a + b, a)), a, b)

goal: is_addition_carry_count(p, n, n, count_prime_factor(p, binom(n + n)(n)))
